mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase borrowing costs and compress equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of observations when FEDFUNDS increases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns exceed zero in >60% of triggered instances over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real personal income and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and construction activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >55% of cases when both series expand concurrently.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production reflects strengthening economic output and corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 during recovery phases or returns are negative in >60% of expansion months.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation above the 200 index threshold forces monetary tightening expectations and erodes real corporate margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >65% of months when CPIAUCSL exceeds 200.0.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms broad-based labor market strength and wage growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative returns in >50% of observations over any 2-year rolling period.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly increases corporate earnings expectations and equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP growth fails to predict 20-day return direction with a Rank IC above 0.04 over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side weakness and reduced corporate output, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of contraction months over a 3-year rolling window.
